description: Reference data module for managing the hierarchical item classification tree used by Item Master.
tables: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.item_categories (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), category_code VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, parent_id UUID REFERENCES public.item_categories(id))
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ic_parent ON public.item_categories(parent_id)

INSERT INTO public.item_categories (category_code, name) VALUES ('RAW','Raw Materials'),('ELEC','Electronics'),('MECH','Mechanical Parts'),('CHEM','Chemicals'),('PKG','Packaging'),('FG','Finished Goods') ON CONFLICT (category_code) DO NOTHING

actions.name: item_category_created
actions.description: Fired when a new category is created.

actions.name: item_category_updated
actions.description: Fired when a category is updated.

actions.name: item_category_deleted
actions.description: Fired when a category is deleted.

actions.name: item_category_imported
actions.description: Fired after a bulk import completes.
